'''Virmeude''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mayagil sector/Legends|Mayagil sector]]. It was the headquarters of [[Issham Mining Corporation]], which was actually a cover for a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base.
